---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
subtitle: "Søren Dalsgård Petersen"
pagetitle: "Søren Dalsgård Petersen - CV"
body-class: cv-page
format:
  html:
    css: cv.css
    page-layout: article
    toc: true
---

::::::::::::::: cv-page
<p class="cv-updated">

Updated <span id="cv-date"></span>

</p>

## Personal Data

:::: cv-section-body
::: personal-container
```{=html}
<dl class="personal-data-list">
{{< include content_html/personal_data.html >}}
</dl>
```

![Søren Dalsgård Petersen](images/profile.jpg){.profile-pic}
:::
::::

## Research Profile and Vision: Data Science for Fungal Biotechnology

::: cv-section-body
```{=html}
{{< include content_html/research_profile.html >}}
```
:::

## Leadership

::: cv-section-body
```{=html}
{{< include content_html/leadership.html >}}
```
:::

## Research applications and funding

::: cv-section-body
```{=html}
{{< include content_html/funding.html >}}
```
:::

## Skills

::: {.cv-section-body .skills}
General competencies within data science and microbiology. Some specific competencies:

<p class="skill-group-heading">

Data Science

</p>

```{=html}
<dl class="skill-indent">
<dt>Programming paradigms</dt>
<dd>Functional Programming</dd>
<dt>Languages and packages</dt>
<dd>Python (NumPy, SciPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Plotly, Scikit-learn), R (Tidyverse, dplyr, tidyr, purr, ggplot, tidymodels), SQL, BASH</dd>
<dt>Software tools</dt>
<dd>Git, <a href="https://github.com/sorpet" target="_blank">GitHub</a>, UNIX commands</dd>
<dt>Databases</dt>
<dd>Design, deployment, and maintenance of relational databases (PostgreSQL)</dd>
<dt>Cloud providers</dt>
<dd>Amazon Web Services (S3, RDBMS)</dd>
<dt>Data science and modelling</dt>
<dd>tidymodels, Scikit-learn, H2O (framework for e.g. deep learning), JBEI ART (<a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-020-18008-4" target="_blank">Automated Recommendation Tool</a>), Teselagen Evolve module</dd>
</dl>
```

<p class="skill-group-heading">

Microbiology

</p>

```{=html}
<dl class="skill-indent">
<dt>Organisms</dt>
<dd><em>S. cerevisiae</em>, <em>E. coli</em>, and mammalian cells (<em>CHO</em>)</dd>
<dt>S. cerevisiae techniques</dt>
<dd>Cell culture, CRISPR-Cas9 genome editing, cell library construction</dd>
<dt>Molecular biology</dt>
<dd>Oligo libraries, USER cloning, Gibson assembly</dd>
<dt>Assays</dt>
<dd>Flow cytometry and cell sorting, Illumina NGS, Biosensors</dd>
</dl>
```
:::

## Education

::: cv-section-body
```{=html}
{{< include content_html/education.html >}}
```
:::

## Work/professional experience (exclusive teaching)

::: cv-section-body
```{=html}
{{< include content_html/work_experience.html >}}
```
:::

## Academic Service and Professional Activities

::: cv-section-body
```{=html}
{{< include content_html/academic_service.html >}}
```
:::

## Teaching

::: cv-section-body
### Courses {.subsection-heading}

```{=html}
{{< include content_html/teaching_courses.html >}}
```

### Student Supervision {.subsection-heading}

```{=html}
{{< include content_html/teaching_students.html >}}
```
:::

## Other communication activities

::: cv-section-body
### National and international peer reviewed conference contributions [(presenters are underscored)]{.annotation} {.subsection-heading}

```{=html}
{{< include content_html/communication_conferences.html >}}
```

### International workshop contributions [(presenters are underscored)]{.annotation} {.subsection-heading}

```{=html}
{{< include content_html/communication_workshops.html >}}
```

In addition to the above-mentioned communication activities, I have regularly presented at internal seminars at the Section for Synthetic Biology, DTU; the Novo Nordisk Foundation Center for Biosustainability, DTU; and the Joint BioEnergy Institute, San Francisco.
:::

## Publication summary

::: cv-section-body
```{=html}
{{< include content_html/publication_summary.html >}}
```
:::

## Publications

```{=html}
{{< include content_html/publications.html >}}
```
:::::::::::::::

```{=html}
<script>
const cvDate = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB', {
  year: 'numeric',
  month: 'long'
});
document.getElementById('cv-date').textContent = cvDate;
</script>
```
